description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black finish accented by subtle red highlights along its frame. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance. It has a tactical pistol grip and a fixed stock, providing ergonomic support for the user. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and a standard-length barrel, with a visible muzzle device at the front. Integrated rails and a compact iron sight system are present on the top, suggesting modularity for attachments. The overall form is angular and streamlined, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black rifle with red accents, featuring a fixed stock, detachable magazine, and standard barrel with a muzzle device. It has a tactical grip and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, magazine, and barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel, muzzle device, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and grip, with the barrel and muzzle device receding into the background.
